title: Create CLI semantic color module colors.ts mirroring Dashboard tokens.css
description: 新建 packages/cli/src/colors.ts 语义色模块, 使用 picocolors + string-width, 镜像 Dashboard tokens.css 的 7 个语义 token (success/warn/error/drift/ai/human/muted). 支持 NO_COLOR=1 和非 TTY 降级. 替换 init/scan/serve 三个命令中的 ad-hoc 颜色输出, scan report 列对齐使用 string-width 实现 CJK 安全.

files.change: Export paint.{success,warn,error,drift,ai,human,muted}, label.{created,skipped,next,reason}, symbol.{ok,warn,error}; NO_COLOR + non-TTY guard; use picocolors; string-width for CJK alignment
Replace ad-hoc chalk/picocolors calls with colors.paint.* and colors.label.* from new colors.ts

files.target: report table output and color calls
files.change: Replace ad-hoc color usage; use string-width from colors.ts for column alignment in CJK-safe table render
Replace ad-hoc color usage with colors.paint.* and colors.symbol.*
Add 'picocolors' and 'string-width' as dependencies if not already present

implementation: Read packages/dashboard/src/styles/tokens.css to extract 7 semantic color token names and purposes
Check if picocolors and string-width are already in packages/cli/package.json; add if missing
Create packages/cli/src/colors.ts: implement NO_COLOR guard (process.env.NO_COLOR || !process.stdout.isTTY); define paint object with 7 semantic keys using picocolors; define label and symbol objects
Implement string-width-based column padding helper in colors.ts: padEnd(str, width, char) that accounts for CJK double-width characters
Update packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts: import { paint, label, symbol } from '../colors'; replace each ad-hoc colored string
Update packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts: import colors; replace ad-hoc color calls; update table column alignment to use padEnd from colors.ts
Update packages/cli/src/commands/serve.ts: import colors; replace ad-hoc output
Run pnpm --filter @fabric/cli build to verify no compile errors
Test NO_COLOR=1 node dist/cli.js scan -- verify no ANSI escape codes in output

reference.pattern: picocolors + NO_COLOR guard + string-width CJK safety
reference.examples: paint.success = (s: string) => isColored ? pc.green(s) : s; symbol.ok = isColored ? '✓' : '[ok]'

criteria: packages/cli/src/colors.ts exists and exports paint, label, symbol objects
paint has exactly 7 keys: success, warn, error, drift, ai, human, muted
NO_COLOR=1 pnpm --filter @fabric/cli exec fab init --dry-run produces output with 0 ANSI escape sequences
packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts imports from '../colors' and has no ad-hoc chalk/picocolors direct calls
packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts uses string-width for column padding
convergence.definition_of_done: CLI 语义色模块完整, NO_COLOR 环境变量正确降级, scan 表格 CJK 对齐正确, 三命令 ad-hoc 颜色已替换

rationale.chosen_approach: centralized colors.ts 模块 — 单一语义抽象层, 便于后续 theme 切换; picocolors 比 chalk 轻量
alternatives_considered: 直接在每个命令文件内维护颜色
decision_factors: Dashboard tokens.css 即品牌资产, CLI 必须镜像保持一致性
string-width 对 CJK 字符宽度计算是必需的
rationale.tradeoffs: 需要读取 tokens.css 确定 7 token 的语义含义; 颜色实际值 (hex) 在 terminal 无意义, 只映射语义功能

manual_checks: NO_COLOR=1 output contains no ESC[ sequences
Non-TTY output (pipe to file) contains no ANSI
CJK characters in scan report align correctly in terminal
success_metrics: 0 ad-hoc chalk/picocolors direct imports in init.ts, scan.ts, serve.ts

commit.message_template: feat(cli): semantic color module colors.ts mirroring Dashboard tokens
